task_statement: P5-B4 fresh-machine prep for P7. Update status/planning docs to reflect current measured P7 readiness honestly: P5 #6 remains prep, P7 full fresh-machine clone/install/onboard/build/verify is not proven; however the previously listed `intake_evidence_projection_case` empty-HOME hazard was re-measured on 0630 with HOME and BRICK_HOME pointed at a fresh temp directory and the `read-side-projection-boundary` profile passed, so it should no longer be carried as an unmeasured active blocker. Preserve proof limits: checker/profile pass is support evidence only, not P7 PASS; actual origin/main fresh clone still required.

nodes.work_statement: Read-only P7/fresh-machine prep inspection. Inspect objective file, AGENTS.md, customer-ready-goal-anchor-v01.md, customer-ready-goal-phases-0629.md, customer-ready-p7-p8-pass-criteria-0629.md, customer-ready-p5-first-run-official-route-plan-0628.md, README/quickstart/setup/launch-guide, support/onboarding/install.sh, release_export.sh, and the checker surfaces for intake_evidence_projection_case. Reconcile the live measurement: command `HOME=$(mktemp -d) BRICK_HOME=$HOME/.brick PYTHONPATH=support/import_identity:. python3 support/checkers/check_profile.py --profile read-side-projection-boundary` passed on 0630. Return a bounded edit map distinguishing: stale hazard wording, still-not-proven actual fresh clone/install/onboard/build, and next P7 measurement steps. Do not mutate files.

Thin status/docs update only. Using the incoming inspection, update P7/P5 status/planning docs so they no longer carry the empty-HOME intake_evidence_projection_case hazard as an active unmeasured blocker if current evidence says it passed. Required meaning: P5 #6 fresh-machine prep has a fresh-HOME profile measurement, but P7 PASS still requires a real origin/main fresh clone -> install -> init/doctor/auth/onboard -> brick build -> evidence/frontier inspection using documented steps only. Do not claim P5/P7/P8 complete. Do not change code, checkers, install script, runtime, provider auth, route policy, Movement literals, or release export behavior.

Evidence-integrity QA. Inspect the changed docs/status diff and the measurement claim. Verify the update distinguishes empty-HOME profile evidence from actual P7 fresh-clone proof. Check that no wording turns checker green into P7 PASS, source truth, success/quality judgment, or Movement authority. Run git diff --check and focused text searches if possible. Do not source-mutate.

Read-only axis inspection. Verify Brick/Agent/Link boundaries in the fresh-machine prep wording: support/checkers/install docs remain support evidence only; Link Movement remains forward/reroute; P7 PASS remains human/COO disposition after actual evidence; release pruning/final architecture remain open. Do not mutate files.

Closure synthesis for P5-B4. Fan in work, evidence-integrity QA, and axis inspection. Return observed_evidence, narrowly_proven, not_proven, remaining_delta, next_target_candidates. Likely next target: actual P7 fresh-clone measurement Building. If no real transition concern exists, return transition_concern_evidence null.

not_proven: install on a separate clean machine
